## xxxx

{{< reveal_vspace 0.5em >}}

:::: {.info-box style="font-size: 1.1em;"}

[<!-- concept  -->]{.info-box-title}

::: {.info-contents .pl-5}

- xxxxx
- xxxxx
- xxxxx

:::
::::

:::: {.columns}
::: {.column width="50%" .font-09}

{{< reveal_vspace 1em >}}

::::{ .square-box-500}

:::{.border-bottom-header-left}

AAAA

:::

:::{.squaredmark style="font-size: 0.9em; padding-right: 1em"}

**Hogehoge**

- 1111
- 2222
- 3333

:::

::::

:::
::: {.column width="50%" .padding-L-12 .font-09}


{{< reveal_vspace 1em >}}


::::{ .square-box-500}

:::{.border-bottom-header-left}

BBBB

:::

:::{.squaredmark style="font-size: 0.9em; padding-right: 1em"}

**Hogehoge**

- 1111
- 2222
- 3333

:::

::::

:::
::::
